version: v1alpha1
id: minimal-java-test
target_repo: https://gitlab.com/iw2rmb/ploy-orw-java11-maven.git
target_branch: main
base_ref: main
lane: C
build_timeout: 10m

steps:

    recipes:

"'

input.command:
ssh root@45.12.75.241 'su - ploy -c "
echo \"🎯 REAL JAVA MIGRATION TEST (No Test Mode)\"
echo \"===========================================\"

# Create Java 11→17 migration without test mode
cat > /tmp/real-java-migration.yaml << \"EOF\"
version: v1alpha1
id: real-java11to17-test
target_repo: https://gitlab.com/iw2rmb/ploy-orw-java11-maven.git  
target_branch: main
base_ref: main
lane: C
build_timeout: 15m

steps:
  - type: recipe
    id: java11to17-migration
    engine: openrewrite
    recipes:
      - org.openrewrite.java.migrate.Java11toJava17
      - org.openrewrite.java.cleanup.CommonStaticAnalysis

# Disable self-healing first to isolate core workflow
self_heal:
  enabled: false
EOF

echo \"✅ Real Java migration config created\"

echo \"\"
echo \"🚀 EXECUTING REAL Java 11→17 Migration:\"
echo \"=======================================\"
cd /opt/ploy && timeout 20m /opt/ploy/bin/ploy transflow run -f /tmp/real-java-migration.yaml -v 2>&1 | tee /tmp/real-java-migration.log

echo \"\"
echo \"📋 Real Migration Results:\"
echo \"==========================\"
tail -15 /tmp/real-java-migration.log
"'

echo \"🚀 DEMONSTRATING SELF-HEALING RECOVERY\"

cat > /tmp/self-healing-demo.yaml << \"EOF\"
version: v1alpha1
id: self-healing-demo-test
target_repo: https://gitlab.com/iw2rmb/ploy-orw-java11-maven.git
target_branch: main  
base_ref: main
lane: C
build_timeout: 10m

steps:
  - type: recipe
    id: java-migration-with-healing
    engine: openrewrite
    recipes:
      - org.openrewrite.java.migrate.Java11toJava17

self_heal:
  enabled: true
  kb_learning: true
  max_retries: 2
  cooldown: 5s
  healing_branches:
    - type: llm-exec
      enabled: true
      timeout: 5m
    - type: human-step

      timeout: 10m
EOF
